tier1.title: Entry / Kickstart
tier1.desc: A premium, lightning-fast website that puts your business on the map. Designed for local restaurants, beauty salons, and rental services ready for their first digital win. Captures 98% of mobile visitors. Pays for itself the moment your first 5 online clients walk through the door.

tier2.title: Growth / Business
tier2.desc: A full website with an online booking calendar, SMS reminders, and all inquiries in one place. No more missed calls or double-bookings. Saves your team 15+ hours per week and fully pays back within 30-45 days through zero scheduling errors.

tier3.title: Enterprise Architecture
tier3.desc: A custom digital platform built around your exact business workflow. Handles hundreds of bookings simultaneously, connects all your locations into one dashboard, and completely eliminates manual coordination. ROI realized in under 90 days through massive operational savings.

leak.title: Losing Clients While You're Not Looking?
leak.subtitle: A slow website and manual booking processes are draining your revenue every day.
leak.text: Every extra second your website takes to load costs you 20% of potential clients. Meanwhile, your team is stuck manually juggling time-slots in WhatsApp — leading to double-bookings and lost revenue. We replace that chaos with a site that loads instantly and a booking system that handles everything automatically, so you capture every client, every time.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about our process, timeline, and how we work with businesses in your region.

items.q: What do I actually get with a booking system?
items.a: With our booking system, your clients book directly on your website 24/7 without phone calls or WhatsApp messages. It automatically sends SMS reminders, prevents double-bookings, and integrates seamlessly with popular CRMs. This reduces manual workload, secures client data in PostgreSQL, and yields a fast, measurable return on investment (ROI).

items.q: How quickly will my website be ready?
items.a: A starter website featuring a fast contact form is ready in 7 days. A full business booking platform with SMS notifications, CRM synchronization, and a custom profit calculator takes 2 to 4 weeks. Large-scale corporate web systems are developed within 6 to 8 weeks, ensuring high page speed and fully optimized code.

items.q: Do you provide support for businesses in Montenegro, Serbia, and Albania?
items.a: Yes! We provide dedicated remote and on-site support for businesses in Montenegro (Tivat, Budva, Podgorica), Serbia (Belgrade), and Albania (Tirana). We guarantee response times under 2 hours via SLA, saving business owners time, maintaining database sync, and ensuring the profit-loss calculator and booking workflows perform flawlessly.

cookie.text: We use essential cookies to measure performance and optimize load times. By utilizing Corebit Studio, you acknowledge our policies.

items.author: Marko J., Managing Director
items.text: Before switching to Corebit Studio, we were losing up to 20% of evening bookings due to the slow loading of our old website on mobile devices during peak season. The team built an instant booking system for us. The site speed is now astonishing, and the multi-language support has helped attract tourists from Western Europe. Full payback in the first month.

items.author: Elena R., Owner
items.text: We were looking for a local agency that understands the specifics of the hotel business on the Adriatic. Corebit Studio created not just a beautiful landing page, but a complete digital infrastructure integrated with our internal PMS. Direct bookings through the website bypassing aggregators grew by 35%.

items.author: Christophe B., Marketing Director
items.text: For our business, it is critical that clients can easily send inquiries in one click. The Corebit developers integrated secure forms and a smart profit calculator. Now we get clean, verified leads directly to our corporate email without spam. Highly recommended as a reliable IT partner.

items.author: Anja V., Operations Director
items.text: Automation saved our customer service. Thanks to Corebit Studio, the integration of procedure schedules and specialists went seamlessly. The site is fully responsive, runs fast on 4G, and the interface is intuitive even for elderly guests.

items.author: Thomas M., Co-founder
items.company: Agile software development model. The Corebit Systems team and their studio unit handle highly complex integration tasks for multinational financial aggregators. Exceptional technical expertise, scalable code (Next.js), and strict deadline compliance.
